# Bad Spec - No Examples

> **Status**: DRAFT
> **Date**: 2026-03-08

---

## 1. Purpose

The Hasher Service computes cryptographic hashes for input data.

---

## 2. Contract

### 2.1 Interface

The hash function takes data and returns its hash.

No code blocks. No examples. No types defined.

---

## 3. Protocol

1. Accept input data.
2. Compute hash.
3. Return result.

---

## 4. Policy

Errors are not defined here.

---

## 5. Boundaries

Nothing is out of scope.
